p.strong: Engineer Reference: Atomic Byte Counters & Histogram Updates

g.title: Entry point for data retrieval. Triggers Hit or Miss counters.
Entry point for data insertion. Triggers byte count and write flush metrics.
Triggered by LRU/LFU policy when capacity reached.
Singleflight deduplication of concurrent requests for same key.
Soft-TTL expiration triggering background update while serving stale data.

ul.li: Hot path metrics use sync/atomic for zero lock contention.
Counters are 64-bit aligned for ARM compatibility.

g.title: go atomic.AddInt64(&hits, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&misses, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&latencySum, μs) atomic.AddInt64(&latencyCount, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&coalesced, 1)
**Metrics Processing Engine:** - hitRate = hits / (hits + misses) - avgLatency = latencySum / latencyCount - p99 = Calculated via Histogram linear interpolation

text # HELP cache_hits_total Total number of hits. # TYPE cache_hits_total counter cache_hits_total 1234
# HELP cache_latency_bucket Latency histogram buckets. # TYPE cache_latency_bucket histogram cache_latency_bucket{le="10"} 100 cache_latency_bucket{le="50"} 450 cache_latency_bucket{le="+Inf"} 1290
**Endpoint Details:** - URI: `/metrics` - Port: 9090 - Scrape Interval: 15s
Entry point for data retrieval. Triggers Hit or Miss counters.
Entry point for data insertion. Triggers byte count and write flush metrics.
Triggered by LRU/LFU policy when capacity reached.
Singleflight deduplication of concurrent requests for same key.
Soft-TTL expiration triggering background update while serving stale data.
go atomic.AddInt64(&hits, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&misses, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&latencySum, μs) atomic.AddInt64(&latencyCount, 1)
go atomic.AddInt64(&coalesced, 1)
**Metrics Processing Engine:** - hitRate = hits / (hits + misses) - avgLatency = latencySum / latencyCount - p99 = Calculated via Histogram linear interpolation

text # HELP cache_hits_total Total number of hits. # TYPE cache_hits_total counter cache_hits_total 1234
# HELP cache_latency_bucket Latency histogram buckets. # TYPE cache_latency_bucket histogram cache_latency_bucket{le="10"} 100 cache_latency_bucket{le="50"} 450 cache_latency_bucket{le="+Inf"} 1290
**Endpoint Details:** - URI: `/metrics` - Port: 9090 - Scrape Interval: 15s
